name: IdsEdwSubRateDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT SR.SUB_RATE_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS PRE_SRC_SYS_CD, SR.SUB_UNIQ_KEY, SR.EFF_DT_SK, SR.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, SR.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, SR.SUB_SK, SR.TERM_DT_SK, SR.RATE_CLS_ID, SR.RISK_CLS_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.SUB_RATE SR LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON SR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK) SELECT SUB_RATE_SK, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(PRE_SRC_SYS_CD)) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE PRE_SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, SUB_UNIQ_KEY, EFF_DT_SK AS SUB_RATE_EFF_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, SUB_SK, RATE_CLS_ID AS SUB_RATE_RATE_CLS_ID, RISK_CLS_ID AS SUB_RATE_RISK_CLS_ID, TERM_DT_SK AS SUB_RATE_TERM_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte1

Description:
JOB NAME:
                               EdwSubRateExtr

DESCRIPTION:  
                               Pulls data from IDS and codes hash file, combines and loads data into the EDW

INPUTS:
                               IDS:  SUB_RATE
  
HASH FILES:
                               hf_cdma_codes - Load the CDMA codes to get cd from cd_sk


TRANSFORMS:  
                               TRIM all the fields that are extracted or used in lookups
                           
PROCESSING:
                               IDS - read from source, lookup all code SK values and get the natural codes

OUTPUTS: 
                               SUB_RATE_D sequential file

MODIFICATIONS:
                               Hugh Sisson - 12/23/2005 - Original Program
                               Suzanne Saylor  04/12/2006 - added RunCycle parameter, set LAST_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK to RunCycle
                               Pooja Sunkara    06/28/2013    Converted job from server to parallel version. Renamed CurrentDate to EDWRunCycleDate and  Renamed job to IdsEdwSubRateDExtr

Annotations:
Add CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK and LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK
Job name:
IdsEdwSubRateDExtr
Subscriber Rate Extract - Pulls from IDS SUB_RATE to load to EDW SUB_RATE_D
Write SUB_RATE_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Ready Job.
Read data from source table SUB_RATE, Pull SRC_SYS_CD column from CD_MPPNG table by joining tables SUB_RATE and CD_MPPNG
